children.heading: Transfer date
children.label: a Transfer date
children.text: Except as provided in subsection (b), the term “transfer date” means the date that is 1 year after .July 21, 2010

children.label: A
children.text: a written determination that commencement of the orderly process to implement this title is not feasible by the date that is 1 year after ;1See References in Text note below.1July 21, 2010

children.label: B
children.text: an explanation of why an extension is necessary to commence the process of orderly implementation of this title;1

children.label: C
children.text: the transfer date designated under this subsection; and

children.label: D
children.text: a description of the steps that will be taken to initiate the process of an orderly and timely implementation of this title within the extended time period.1

children.heading: Publication of notice
children.label: 2 Publication of notice
children.text: Not later than 270 days after , the Secretary shall publish in the Federal Register notice of any transfer date designated under paragraph (1).July 21, 2010
